overall.description: Atmospheric third-person game footage follows a female character walking through a misty canyon at dusk. She traverses shallow water between towering rock formations before emerging into an open grassland with rolling hills and a wooden fence.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty rocky canyon with shallow stream

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the shallow water in the canyon toward the distant opening

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face forming the left wall of the canyon
tall rocky cliff face forming the right wall of the canyon
shallow water covering the canyon floor with reflective surface
faint warm lights visible in the distance beyond the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow misty canyon with towering rock walls on both sides. A shallow stream flows along the path, reflecting the dim blue light, while distant lights twinkle on the left horizon.

events.description: path curves left as the canyon narrows and rock walls close in

agents.ego_description: navigating a left turn through the narrowing canyon passage as the walls converge

entered.detail: rolling grassy hills becoming visible at the canyon exit ahead

segments.scene_description: The canyon narrows significantly as the character turns left through the winding passage. The rock walls loom closer on both sides while grassy hills emerge in the distance ahead, signaling the approaching exit from the canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with winding dirt path

events.description: exits narrow canyon into expansive open grassland with rolling hills
wooden fence appears on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the open dirt path through rolling grass hills toward distant mountains

entered.detail: dry dirt trail replacing the stream as the walking surface
weathered wooden fence running alongside the right side of the path
hazy mountain silhouettes visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the canyon, the character walks through an expansive foggy grassland with rolling hills stretching into the distance. The ground becomes a dry dirt path, and a weathered wooden fence appears on the right side as she continues toward the hazy mountains on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow, misty canyon that gradually opens into an expansive, foggy grassland. It begins with the character walking along a shallow stream reflecting dim blue light, flanked by towering rock walls and distant twinkling lights on the horizon. As the character turns left, the canyon narrows significantly, with the looming walls pressing closer before the first glimpses of grassy hills appear ahead. The scene then expands as the character emerges from the rocky passage onto a dry dirt path, where the confined space gives way to rolling hills and a weathered wooden fence. Finally, the camera follows her across the open landscape toward hazy mountains stretching into the distance.
